'''Chirgay''' was an [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Dathomir system/Legends|Dathomir system]],<ref name="TEA" /> a part of the [[Quelii sector/Legends|Quelii sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. A [[Temperature/Legends|cold]] planet, it occupied the ninth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around its [[Star/Legends|star]], [[Domir/Legends|Domir]]. It was itself circled by one [[Moon/Legends|moon]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Chirgay was first mentioned in ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'', a [[2004]] sourcebook for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', published by [[Wizards of the Coast]].<ref name="GatORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> The [[2009]] book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Dathomir [[Star system/Legends|system]], and thus Chirgay, in grid square O-6.<ref name="TEA" />
